scripts.build:frontend: cd ../RSA && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.join('..','RSA','dist');const dst=p.join(__dirname,'build');if(fs.existsSync(src)){if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('✓ Frontend build copied to backend build/');}else console.warn('⚠ Frontend dist not found at '+src);"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && npm install
